title: spermacoce noronhensis
intro: Spermacoce noronhensis, also known as the Noronha's Spermacoce, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spermacoce noronhensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an anti-arthritic agent. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
